input: I want to return a product I bought 20 days ago.
expected_output: Agent confirms the customer is within the 30-day return window and provides clear return instructions.
criteria: Must correctly state the 30-day return policy, confirm eligibility, and offer to initiate the return process.

input: I want to return a product I bought 45 days ago.
expected_output: Agent politely explains the 30-day return window has passed and offers alternatives such as store credit or an exchange.
criteria: Must accurately state the return window has expired. Must not offer a full refund. Should offer at least one alternative.

input: My order arrived damaged. What do I do?
expected_output: Agent apologizes, asks for an order number or photo, and offers a replacement or full refund regardless of when the order was placed.
criteria: Must acknowledge the issue with empathy. Must not apply the 30-day policy to damaged goods. Must offer replacement or refund.

input: How do I upgrade to the premium plan?
expected_output: Agent explains the premium plan benefits and provides a direct link or clear steps to upgrade.
criteria: Must describe at least two premium plan benefits. Must provide actionable next steps for upgrading.

input: I was charged twice for my subscription this month.
expected_output: Agent apologizes, confirms they will investigate the duplicate charge, and provides a timeline for resolution or refund.
criteria: Must acknowledge the error. Must not ask the customer to dispute with their bank first. Must commit to a resolution timeline.

input: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied with the product?
expected_output: Agent confirms the 30-day satisfaction guarantee and explains how to initiate a refund.
criteria: Must mention the 30-day satisfaction guarantee. Must not add conditions not in the policy.

input: I never received my order and it says delivered.
expected_output: Agent apologizes, asks for the order number, and offers to either reship the order or issue a full refund.
criteria: Must not tell the customer to contact the carrier themselves as the only option. Must offer a direct resolution.

expected_output: Agent clearly explains that customers can cancel anytime before the next billing cycle and will not be charged again.
criteria: Must state that cancellation can happen at any time. Must clarify that no further charges occur after cancellation.

input: I want to speak to a human agent.
expected_output: Agent acknowledges the request and provides a clear path to reach a human support agent.
criteria: Must not try to resolve the issue itself after the customer explicitly requests a human. Must provide escalation steps.

input: Do you offer discounts for annual subscriptions?
expected_output: Agent confirms an annual discount exists and provides the discount amount or directs the customer to the pricing page.
criteria: Must confirm a discount exists. Must provide either the discount percentage or a link to pricing details.
